figures.caption: Fig. 2: Details of the Reflection Module in Fig 1.

Fig. 1: The overall CMMR-VLN framework consists of three modules from left to right. The Multimodal Experience Memory (MEM) performs memory building before navigation. The Retrieval-Augmented Generation Pipeline (RAGP) carries out corresponding prompting and action execution at each navigation step. The Reflection Module conducts reflection and updates the experience in memory after navigation.
